name: Scaglione, Frank
resolved_employer: Iron Resources LLC (owner) - Austin custom iron work / architectural metal shop
evidence: BBB profile for Iron Resources LLC, Austin TX lists principal 'Mr. Frank Scaglione, Owner'; business started 10/23/2006, BBB category 'Iron Works', website austinironresources.com ('custom iron work - furniture - accessories'). A Frank Scaglione (age 57) is listed in Austin public records, consistent with the 78751 filing address. Note: a ZoomInfo entry ties a 'Frank Scaglione, Owner at Iron Resources' to ironresourcesltd.com, which is an unrelated Nigerian interior-finishings firm - discarded. Industry coded Construction for architectural/ornamental metal fabrication, though the shop also sells furniture/accessories at retail, so the label is somewhat approximate.

name: Snedaker, Lee
resolved_employer: Voltek Systems Inc. (founder / President) - Austin cleantech low-voltage DC power distribution manufacturer
evidence: Lee Snedaker is listed as President and founder of Voltek Systems Inc. (founded June 2018), an Austin-based manufacturer of low-voltage DC power distribution, USB-C power outlets and LED lighting controls; the company self-describes as 'Cleantech Distributed DC Power Solutions'. Company address is 3007 Longhorn Blvd, Austin 78758; donor's 78749 is a separate residential zip, so corroboration rests on the name+title+company match rather than zip. Coded Energy / Environment for the cleantech power focus; a Technology/hardware coding would also be defensible.

name: Jaros, Kristen
resolved_employer: Shattuck Labs, Inc. (Senior Director, Alliance Management / business development)
evidence: Kristen Wilcox Jaros is Senior Director of Alliance Management at Shattuck Labs and is based in Austin, TX per her LinkedIn profile, matching the filed employer 'Shattuck Labs' and occupation 'Business Development'. Shattuck Labs (NASDAQ: STTK) is a clinical-stage biotech developing bi-functional fusion proteins for cancer and autoimmune disease, with offices in Austin, TX and Durham, NC. Donor's Democratic-leaning FEC history (lean 1.0, 4 gifts) is consistent with a Watson contribution.

name: Sharplin, Dan
resolved_employer: Flash (FlashParking) - Chairman; was CEO from 2019 at the time of the 2022 gift
evidence: Dan Sharplin was CEO of Austin-based Flash (FlashParking) from 2019 and is now Executive Chairman of the board, matching the filed employer 'Flash' and occupation 'CEO' as of the May 2022 gift. Flash is a parking-and-charging technology platform founded in Austin in 2011; it was acquired by Vista Equity Partners in 2022. Sharplin previously founded SiteControls, a smart-grid/energy-efficiency cleantech startup sold to Siemens. No oil/defense/pro-Israel/gun affiliations found.

name: Crisara, Tina
evidence: Identity corroborated but occupation unknown. Tina M Crisara co-owns a single-family home at 5616 Sedona Dr, Austin TX 78759 with Philip Crisara per county property-valuation records, exactly matching the filing zip 78759 and the address shown on the Austin campaign-finance report. She is named as Philip Crisara's wife in the 2025 Austin obituary of Angela M. Crisara. Occupation and employer were filed as 'requested' (not disclosed) and no public source establishes her employment, so no industry is assigned.

name: Yeager, Ryan
evidence: Ryan Yeager is Managing Director at Slate Real Estate Partners, a Houston-based privately held real estate investment firm founded in 2016 that focuses on ground-up multifamily development; he underwrites and manages development projects and previously was a corporate credit analyst at Frost Bank in Houston. Matches the filed employer 'Slate', occupation 'Real Estate', and Houston 77027 location.

name: Helgren, Blair
resolved_employer: Woodland Property Group (commercial real estate broker / development, tenant representation)
evidence: Blair Helgren is a commercial real estate broker at Woodland Property Group, a full-service Austin real estate firm at 1704 S Congress Ave that develops, manages, leases and sells retail shopping centers and office space. He has 26+ years in Central Texas commercial real estate, handles site selection and master planning for new shopping-center developments, and heads the firm's tenant representation. Matches filed employer, occupation 'Real Estate', and Austin location.

name: Pampe, Derek
resolved_employer: Harris & Straub (Vice President) - land and residential development
evidence: Derek Pampe joined Harris & Straub in 2016 and serves as Vice President; he has three decades of real estate development experience and has managed 40+ projects through site acquisition, entitlement, financing and development. Harris & Straub is an Austin-based affiliate of James R. Harris Partners, a large land/residential developer whose parent operates across both Greater Austin and Dallas/Fort Worth - consistent with the donor's Fort Worth 76107 address alongside an Austin-market employer. He is also listed as president of DWP Land Investments, LLC.

name: Morgan, Jennifer
resolved_employer: Trinity Episcopal School, Austin (Head of School)
evidence: Jennifer Hill Morgan has been Head of School at Trinity Episcopal School, a PreK-8 independent school in Austin, since 2020 (installed October 2021), matching the filed employer 'Austin Trinity Episcopal School' and occupation 'School Administration' at the June 2022 gift. She joined Trinity in 2000 as its first kindergarten teacher and later served as admission officer, high school placement director, and head of lower school; she holds an M.Ed. in Independent School Leadership from Vanderbilt's Peabody College.

name: Whitworth, Suzie
resolved_employer: Page Home Design (founder / owner, interior designer)
evidence: Suzie Page Whitworth is the founder and owner of Page Home Design, a full-service interior design firm and home-goods retail shop at 2408 Lake Austin Blvd (zip 78703, matching the donor's filing zip), established 2007 and described as the first interiors store in Austin's Design District. Matches filed employer and occupation 'Designer'; her FEC history leans Democratic (lean 1.0, 4 gifts). Industry coded Architecture as the closest design-services label in the taxonomy - the business is equally a retail storefront, so the coding is approximate.

name: Banczak, John
resolved_employer: Vacasa (COO / Chief Strategy Officer at the time of the gift); co-founder, chairman and CEO of TurnKey Vacation Rentals until its 2021 acquisition by Vacasa
evidence: John Banczak co-founded Austin-based TurnKey Vacation Rentals in 2013 with T.J. Clark and served as chairman/CEO; TurnKey raised roughly $120M and was acquired by Vacasa in 2021, with Banczak staying on as a Vacasa executive (COO / Chief Strategy Officer), matching the filed employer 'Vacasa' and occupation 'Vacation Rentals' at the March 2022 gift. He previously held leadership roles at HomeAway, Hotwire.com and BedandBreakfast.com, is an angel investor in Austin startups, and is co-owner of the Sage Hill Inn & Spa. Vacasa maintained TurnKey's Austin HQ, consistent with the 78746 address.

name: Gillespie, Lawrence
resolved_employer: Safeguard Global (president, per filing) - global payroll / HR outsourcing and employer-of-record firm headquartered in Austin
evidence: Employer is self-reported on the filing: Safeguard Global, a global payroll/HR outsourcing and employer-of-record company headquartered at 108 Wild Basin Rd South, Austin 78746 - which is itself the donor's filed zip, so 78746 likely reflects the work address and does not independently corroborate identity. No 'Lawrence Gillespie' could be confirmed at the company: the only Gillespie found in a president role there is Danny Gillespie, President of Global Pay, based in Austin (ex-Mood Media CIO/CTO, Baylor MBA). 'Danny' is not a standard diminutive of 'Lawrence' and no source links the two names, so the person is NOT confirmed and no affiliation is asserted. Flagged for follow-up: if Lawrence and Danny Gillespie are the same person, third-party profiles list a McBryde Oil (Kerrville, TX fuel distributor) board membership, which would be an oil_gas affiliation - unverified and deliberately not recorded below.
